svg.title: state diagram
svg.desc: A state diagram with 13 nodes and 16 edges. organized in 1 groups. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: __state_start, Idle : complete, Processing.. Key relationships: __state_start points to Idle : complete; __state_start points to Validating; Validating points to Computing.. Layout spans 922 by 1254 units with 13 rendered node boxes and 16 routed edge paths.

text.font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
